parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({
  model: 'llama-3.1-8b-instant',
  temperature: 0,
  response_format: {
    type: "json_object"
  },
  messages: [
    {
      role: "system",
      content: `You are an expert technical recruiter and resume parser.

Extract structured candidate information from the resume text.

Return ONLY valid JSON matching EXACTLY this schema:

{
  "candidate_name": string,
  "email": string,
  "phone": string,
  "location": string,
  "total_experience_years": number,
  "current_role": string,
  "current_company": string,
  "education": [string],
  "technical_skills": [string],
  "soft_skills": [string],
  "certifications": [string],
  "languages": [string],
  "projects": [string],
  "linkedin_profile": string
}

Rules:
- DO NOT rename any keys.
- DO NOT use alternative keys like name, skills, experience_years, or work_experience.
- Use null for missing string or number fields.
- Use [] for missing arrays.
- Never fabricate information that is not present in the resume.
- For current_role and current_company, extract the latest role and employer from work experience.
- total_experience_years must be a number only.
- technical_skills must contain only technical skills.
- Return pure JSON only. No markdown and no explanations.`
    },
    {
      role: "user",
      content: $json.text
    }
  ]
}) }}

parameters.jsCode:
// ---- Multiple Job Descriptions (Priority 2) ----
// Add / edit job openings here. The workflow auto-selects the best match
// based on keywords found in the email subject line. If nothing matches,
// it falls back to the first (default) job description below.

const jobDescriptions = [
  {
    title: "Python Developer",
    keywords: ["python developer", "python dev", "backend developer", "python engineer", "backend python"],
    description: `Job Title

Python Developer

Experience

1-3 Years

Location

Hyderabad, Bangalore, Remote

Employment Type

Full-Time

About the Role

We are looking for a skilled Python Developer to design, build, and maintain backend
applications and APIs. The ideal candidate writes clean, efficient Python code, works
comfortably with relational databases, and understands the fundamentals of building
and deploying production software.

Key Responsibilities
Design and develop backend services and REST APIs using Python.
Write clean, maintainable, well-tested code following object-oriented principles.
Work with relational databases (PostgreSQL/MySQL) to design schemas and write queries.
Debug, test, and optimize existing applications for performance and reliability.
Use Git for version control and collaborate with a team using standard branching workflows.
Containerize and deploy applications using Docker.
Write unit and integration tests to ensure code quality.
Collaborate with cross-functional teams to translate requirements into working software.

Required Skills
Programming
Python
Object-Oriented Programming
REST APIs
SQL

Frameworks & Tools
Django or Flask
Git
GitHub
Docker
Pytest or Unittest

Databases
PostgreSQL
MySQL

Preferred Qualifications
Experience building and deploying production backend services.
Familiarity with CI/CD pipelines.
Basic understanding of cloud platforms (AWS/GCP/Azure).
Strong debugging and problem-solving skills.
Good communication and ability to work in a team environment.

Ideal Candidate Profile

- 1-3 years of hands-on Python development experience
- Built and shipped REST APIs using Django or Flask
- Comfortable writing SQL queries and designing database schemas
- Experience with Git-based version control workflows
- Familiar with Docker for containerized deployment
- Writes and maintains automated tests
- Strong fundamentals in data structures and OOP`
  },
  {
    title: "Data Analyst",
    keywords: ["data analyst", "data analytics", "business analyst", "reporting analyst"],
    description: `Job Title

Data Analyst

Experience

1-3 Years

Location

Remote / Hybrid

Employment Type

Full-Time

About the Role

We are looking for a Data Analyst who can turn raw data into actionable insights,
build dashboards, and support data-driven decision making across teams.

Required Skills
SQL, Excel, Python (pandas), data visualization (Power BI / Tableau),
statistics fundamentals, strong communication skills.

Preferred Qualifications
Experience with A/B testing, ETL pipelines, and business intelligence tools.`
  },
  {
    title: "Frontend Developer",
    keywords: ["frontend developer", "front-end developer", "react developer", "ui developer", "javascript developer"],
    description: `Job Title

Frontend Developer

Experience

1-3 Years

Location

Remote / Hybrid

Employment Type

Full-Time

About the Role

We are looking for a Frontend Developer skilled in building responsive,
accessible, and performant user interfaces.

Required Skills
JavaScript/TypeScript, React, HTML5, CSS3, REST API integration,
Git, responsive design, testing (Jest/RTL).

Preferred Qualifications
Experience with Next.js, state management (Redux/Zustand), and CI/CD pipelines.`
  }
];

// Try to detect the target role from the email subject first, then fall back
// to scanning the subject/sender fields for any additional signal.
const subject = String($json.email_subject || $json.subject || $json.Subject || '').toLowerCase();

let selected = jobDescriptions.find(jd =>
  jd.keywords.some(kw => subject.includes(kw))
);

let matchedBy = 'keyword-match';
if (!selected) {
  selected = jobDescriptions[0]; // default JD when no keyword is found in the subject
  matchedBy = 'default-fallback';
}

return [{
  json: {
    ...$json,
    job_title: selected.title,
    job_description: selected.description,
    job_description_matched_by: matchedBy,
    available_job_titles: jobDescriptions.map(j => j.title)
  }
}];

parameters.subject: =Interview Invitation - {{$json.fields['Candidate Name']}}
parameters.message:
=Hi {{$json.fields['Candidate Name']}},

Thank you for applying for the {{$json.fields['Job Title Applied For'] || 'role'}} position. We were impressed with your profile and would like to invite you for an interview.

To help you prepare, here are a few areas we'll likely explore during the conversation:
{{ ($json.interview_questions || []).map((q, i) => (i + 1) + '. ' + q).join('
') }}

Our recruiting team will follow up shortly with a calendar invite.

Best regards,
Recruitment Team

additionalFields.description:
=AI Match Score: {{$('Create Candidate in Airtable').item.json.fields['Match Score']}}
Summary: {{$('Create Candidate in Airtable').item.json.fields['AI Summary']}}

parameters.subject: =Manual Review Needed: {{$json.name}} ({{$json.match_score}}% match)
